title: MOND-198 Longing brother-in-law and Naoko Akase - Shoko Akase
description: I'm living in my brother's house because of my work. My brother's life rhythm is different and I haven't met him very much, but his brother's wife, Naoko, is very good at it, so I was thrilled every day. That should be because I had been delusional of such a wonderful bride since my brother introduced me to Naoko a long time ago. One day when my work schedule changed and I came home, Naoko was masturbating alone while watching erotic videos. I tried to leave gently, but Naoko noticed it. When I ran into my room, Naoko came. I nodded to the question that you saw it. He was told to look down and shook his head. And I was so nervous that I confessed that I liked Naoko-san. Then Naoko-san, can you keep what you saw earlier? I heard that. Of course, when I nodded, instead of keeping it a secret, I gently closed my eyes and brought my lips closer to me ...
